\begin{minipage}{0.94\linewidth}
\footnotesize Notes: Generated from formal Phase 6 sources under results/formal/phase06. Panel means use results/formal/phase06/tables/main_behavioral_table.csv; paired differences use results/formal/phase06/tables/paired_bootstrap_ci.csv. Served share equals served requests divided by original requests; vehicle-km per served trip divides vehicle-km by served trips; vehicle-km per original request divides vehicle-km by all original requests. Choice and feasibility rejection rates use original requests as the denominator. Paired differences use 80 seed-scale pairs and are descriptive formal primary behavioral evidence, not paired hypothesis-test significance claims.
\end{minipage}
